settings.heading: Find the right manual fast
settings.copy: Browse manuals and setup guides by product family and install stage without digging through side paths.
settings.support_note: Start with the guide that matches your product and stage. If one detail is still unclear, move to compatibility or direct help.

settings.heading: Manuals and setup guidance in one place
settings.copy: See more of the manual library at once so the right setup guide is easier to spot.
settings.source_note: Start with product and setup stage. If the right guide still is not obvious, check compatibility or get help now.

settings.heading: Guide not enough for your setup?
settings.copy: Move straight to compatibility or a support request without restarting from the hub.
